title: Kagaku Chop
titleNative: カガクチョップ
synopsis: Sai Suzuzono, chief of the Science Club, spends all of her time developing crazy experiments to satisfy her curiosity, like a real "mad scientist." The only one trying to contain her antics is Ren Nagakura, the class committee chairman; but Ren, despite being the class chairman, is also little clueless about other people (i.e. she's an idiot). And with Ren's involvement, Sai's weird experiments always turn out even weirder... Note: Includes 5 extra chapters.

title: My Secret Affection
titleRomaji: Kimi no Koto ga Suki de Ienai.
titleNative: 君のことが好きで言えない。
synonyms: No puedo decirte que te quiero
Ich darf nicht sagen, dass ich dich liebe
synopsis: It’s been thirty years since meteorites from space turned everyone on the Earth gay. In a world where heterosexuality no longer exists, Takanashi Kazusa falls for her childhood friend Ayumu–a boy. Though she’s doing everything she can to act normal whenever they hang out, her love for Ayumu is growing stronger by the day. How much longer can she hide her secret feelings? (Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)

title: Inochi no Tabekata
titleNative: いのちの食べ方
synopsis: Otogiri Tobi, a 2nd grade middle school student, spends his depressing days searching for his missing older brother alongside his inhuman companion, Baku. Tobi used to rarely speak to anyone besides Baku, however one day after his classmate Shiratama Ryuuko suddenly approaches him, his life begins to change...? This is an adventure surrounding the "human" and the "inhuman" that a lone boy faces. (Source: Kadokawa, translated)

title: Dugeundugeun Daejakjeon
titleNative: 두근두근 대작전
synopsis: “Don’t you think we’re missing that heart-fluttering feeling?” From elementary school all the way to high school, Nam Do-yeon and Jeong A-rin have gone from childhood friends to lovers. For a couple who strives for a perfectly rational relationship, a plan to reclaim that one missing piece of excitement. Operation: Heartbeat begins! (Source: Naver, translated)

title: Chronicles of an Online Game Addict's Reincarnation in Another World: He Can't Use the Fighting Skill That Earned Him the Title of Fist King, so He Started Swinging a Club for Eight Hours a Day
titleRomaji: Netoge Haijin no Isekai Tenseiki: Ken Ou to Yobareta Saikyou no Kobunshi ga Tsukenai node, 1-nichi 8-jikan Konbou wo Furu Koto kara Hajimeta
titleEnglish: Chronicles of an Online Game Addict's Reincarnation in Another World: He Can't Use the Fighting Skill That Earned Him the Title of Fist King, so He Started Swinging a Club for Eight Hours a Day
titleNative: ネトゲ廃人の異世界転生記 拳王とよばれた最強の拳が使えないので、1日8時間こん棒を振ることからはじめた
synopsis: Kazuya finally became the strongest player in the VRMMORPG he devoted his life to and gained the title "Fist King." Just as he became number one, he was reborn in another world like the game, where monsters roam free! In this new world where firearms are favored over melee weapons, Kazuya takes up a club to once again pursue his ideal strength! (Source: MangaPlaza)
chapterSourceTitle: Senchi Kara Kaette kita Takashi-kun. Futsuu ni Koukou Seikatsu wo Okuritai

title: Zhang De Tai Xiang BOSS, Jieguo Shì Ren Zhen De Xin Le.
titleRomaji: Zhang De Tai Xiang BOSS, Jieguo Shì Ren Zhen De Xin Le.
titleNative: 长的太像BOSS，结果世人真的信了
synopsis: Su Liang, the King Of The Moon! Master of the Divine Lunar Butterfly, with the power to control time and space, ying and yang, the invincible young man will stand at the pinnacle of this world! So I transmigrated to this world and into this powerful body, sounds like a great start... except it's all bullshit! My familiar is no Lunar Butterfly!! It's just a low-level glow moth that can barely light up a room!!! Now I'm faced with millions of fanatical believers, a battle with the Emperor Cangyue scheduled in three years time, and all of the major sects who see me as a thorn in their eyes... This is… big trouble for a beast-master! (Source: Bilibili, translated)
searchTerms: Zhang De Tai Xiang BOSS, Jieguo Shì Ren Zhen De Xin Le.

title: Konyakusha ni Wasurerareta Watashi Ringoku no Koutaishi Denka to Gisou Konyaku suru Koto ni Narimashita (※Tadashi, Denka no Honmei wa Watashi Mitai desu!?)
titleRomaji: Konyakusha ni Wasurerareta Watashi Ringoku no Koutaishi Denka to Gisou Konyaku suru Koto ni Narimashita (※Tadashi, Denka no Honmei wa Watashi Mitai desu!?)
titleNative: 婚約者に忘れられた私、隣国の皇太子殿下と偽装婚約することになりました(※ただし、殿下の本命は私みたいです!?
synopsis: Leafe, the eldest daughter of a duke, is the reincarnation of the dark magician Laurie. In her previous life, she was feared as an evil woman of unparalleled wickedness and lived a solitary life. In this life, she has avoided loneliness and has successfully lived a smooth life surrounded by her family and fiancé. However, her younger sister Aria stole her fiancé and kicked her out of the house, returning her to a life of solitude. In order to attend Aria's engagement party and fight back, Leafe asks Oliver, the crown prince of a neighboring country, to be her partner. She thought this would be a one-off, but for some reason Oliver has asked her to marry him!? (Source: Kodansha, translated)

latestChapterTitle: My younger sister stole my Fiancé

title: Oishinbo
titleNative: 美味しんぼ
synopsis: Around the offices of Tozai News, Shiro Yamaoka has a reputation for being over-blunt, under-ambitious, and generally an all-around slacker. So why has he been given the important job of coming up with the "Ultimate Menu" to celebrate the newspaper's 100th anniversary? Because he possesses qualities his other colleagues don't: an exquisitely discerning palate, an encyclopedic knowledge of food and drink, and a masterful touch in the kitchen. (Source: VIZ Media)

title: Battlefront of the Great Powers
titleNative: 列強戦線
synopsis: In the year 2206, planet Earth is on the brink of destruction. Due to pollution and a shortage of resources, scientists estimate that the planet will become unable to sustain life within the next hundred years. To resolve the issue of scarcity, the world's leaders have come together and decided on a desperate solution-the National Extinction Tournament. Gathering those with powers beyond human comprehension, these boys and girls will compete for the sake of their nations...and their own survival! Win and become a hero. Lose and death awaits not only you but everyone you love... (Source: Yen Press)

title: Today with You
titleNative: 너와 사는 오늘
synopsis: "I just need to date someone too!" Dohee Kang's had the biggest crush on her childhood friend, Jaehyuk Kim, for years. But after his girlfriend tells her to get her own boyfriend, Dohee declares she will. Handsome, but eccentric Wonyoung Goh, happens to overhear and takes an interest in her. Will love be able to bloom between them? (Source: Manta)

title: A.O.Z Re-Boot Gundam Inle: Kuro Usagi no Mita Yume
titleRomaji: A.O.Z Re-Boot Gundam Inle: Kuro Usagi no Mita Yume
titleNative: A.O.Z Re-Boot ガンダム・インレ-くろうさぎのみた夢
synonyms: Advance of Zeta Re-Boot: Gundam Inle - Black Rabbit Had a Dream
synopsis: A.O.Z Re-Boot Gundam Inle: Kuro Usagi no Muta Yume is set in U.C. 0091after the end of the First Neo Zeon War. Zeon Remnants had retreated to Mars, forming "ReZeon" under General Alicia Zabi. By absorbing the Titans remnants after the Gryps War, they strengthened their military strength. This story depicts the Titans comeback that began on Mars. Their dream--what does "the shining star again" mean? Look, with a bird's-eye view, at the memories of their battles spun in history. Note: The first chapter was pre-published on April 25, 2014 in Dengeki Hobby Magazine.

title: Arafou Kenja no Isekai Seikatsu Nikki
titleRomaji: Arafou Kenja no Isekai Seikatsu Nikki
titleNative: アラフォー賢者の異世界生活日記
synonyms: Around 40 Kenja no Isekai Seikatsu Nikki
synopsis: Satoshi Oosako is a 40-year-old unemployed man who becomes engrossed in the VR RPG "Sword and Sorcery" after being laid off from his job. In the game, he goes by the name Zeros Merlin and rises to become a top-ranked player. However, he suddenly dies in the middle of a long gaming session. To his surprise, Satoshi wakes up to find himself in a massive unfamiliar forest. He soon learns from the goddess of this world, who brought him here after his death, that he has been reincarnated with all of his in-game stats intact. (Source: Kadokawa, translated)

title: Raul and His Vampire Prince
titleNative: ラウルと吸血鬼
synopsis: As a young orphan, Raul was adopted and saved by the effeminate, eternally youthful vampire Rose. Since then, he's wanted nothing more than to help and protect his vampiric savior. His conviction—and training—has helped him grow into a strong, muscular young man. However, no matter how much Raul grows, Rose can't help seeing him as that little orphan boy… (Source: Seven Seas Entertainment)

title: Moto Sekai 1-i no Sub Chara Ikusei Nikki: Hai Player, Isekai wo Kouryaku-chuu!
titleRomaji: Moto Sekai 1-i no Sub Chara Ikusei Nikki: Hai Player, Isekai wo Kouryaku-chuu!
titleNative: 元・世界1位のサブキャラ育成日記 ～廃プレイヤー、異世界を攻略中！～
synonyms: Moto Sekai Ichi'i Subchara Ikusei Nikki: Hai Player, Isekai wo Kouryakuchuu!
The Former Top 1's Sub-Character Training Diary: A Dedicated Player is Currently Conquering Another World!~
The Former World Number 1's Alt Character Training Diary
synopsis: The protagonist who was rarely ever at school during his middle school and high school days, is unemployed even as an adult. From morning till night, it was video games. For him who was ranked first worldwide, it was his life. One day, his character is suddenly hacked. The data was unrecoverable and there was nothing that could be done. Feeling great despair at having lost his rank that he had bet everything to achieve in a world that controlled his life, the protagonist attempts suicide. When he awakens, he finds himself inside the video game, no, it was a real world that resembled it. There, he notices that he has reincarnated into the the body of a sub character that he had created and bought premium benefits for long ago but had left neglected.

title: A Record of a Mortal's Journey to Immortality
titleEnglish: A Record of a Mortal's Journey to Immortality
titleNative: 凡人修仙传
synopsis: The village boy Han Li was born poor. To subsidize household expenses, he joins the Qixuanmen Sect. Because of his spiritual roots, he was accepted as a disciple by the mysterious Doctor Mo and started to practice "Changchun Gong" arts under his mentorship. Although his qualifications are mediocre, Han Li embarked on the dangerous road of immortal cultivation with his unyielding will and a mysterious vial picked up by accident.

title: Nami Uraraka ni, Meoto Biyori
titleNative: 波うららかに、めおと日和
synopsis: In the spring of the 11th year of the Showa era, 20-year-old Natsumi receives a marriage proposal to Takiaki Masashi, who works for the Imperial Navy. Suddenly, she is married to a Navy husband. Their (fairly) inexperienced in house matters, as well as in the affairs of men and women, begin their life as a couple in the highest degree of purity! When the sea breeze blows, I think of you. A story of a couple living in prewar Japan, spring, summer, fall, and winter, humble but gentle.

synopsis: Miyuki-san is an elegant young lady from Kyoto. But our relationship is complicated. Why? "My, you sure are good at flattery," she says. But were those words sincere? Or just for show? Though we care for each other, we keep talking past one another—a frustrating, bittersweet love story. (Source: Comic Growl)
